emails.subject: Interview- 10/4
emails.body: As of Friday, October 13, it seems that this student had not heard back from Enron. What is the timeline for getting back to students regarding Super Saturday? Forwarded by Sally Beck/HOU/ECT on 10/17/2000 04:36 PM Irfiman@aol.com on 10/13/2000 01:15:38 AM

emails.subject: Re: Interview- 10/4
emails.body: Re: Interview- 10/4 Sally: Thank you for forwarding this information to me. I instructed the candidates on campus that we would be in touch with them within 2 weeks. Actually, for OU students, I will be calling them personally tomorrow to let them know their status. Their invitation letters will be sent shortly thereafter. Thanks! lexi From: Sally Beck ECT 10/17/2000 04:38 PM

emails.subject: Re: Interview- 10/4
emails.body: Irfan was one of the UT students, not OU. Just wanted to make sure that we have him on the right list. Enron North America Corp. From: Lexi Elliott ENRON 10/17/2000 04:59 PM
